title: Sundial and Indiva Announce Closing of $22 Million Strategic Investment
text: In February 2021, Sundial Growers made a $22 million strategic investment into Indiva Limited, a leading Canadian producer of cannabis edibles. The investment was completed through a brokered private placement of 25 million Indiva common shares at $0.44 per share (raising $11 million) and a secured non-revolving term loan facility of $11 million. Sundial was the sole subscriber in the placement and sole lender of the term loan. The term loan matured on February 23, 2024, and bore an interest rate of 9% per annum, with 50% of accrued interest payable monthly in cash and the remaining 50% payable at Indiva's option either monthly or in arrears at maturity. This strategic investment represented SNDL's early entry into the infused edibles market through partnership with a leading manufacturer.
